agreements: The papers agree that LEO beamforming needs bounded method and evaluation claims.
disagreements: The papers differ in method emphasis, data assumptions, and evaluation setup.
gaps: Real-world deployment validation remains an evidence gap.
limitations: This fixture cites only paper evidence; memory/tool logs/trace are excluded from citations.
